water_complaintSubtitle: Report water supply issues, leakage, drainage, or service problems
water_complaintDesc: Your water-related complaint has been successfully recorded and forwarded to the municipality department.
track_digitalIndia: Digital India Initiative • SUVIDHA / AAZHI Platform
wb_anonymityDesc: This channel is fully anonymous by design. No logins, Aadhaar identity, mobile phone numbers, or IP logs are collected. In accordance with the Civic Integrity Act, all submitted evidence files undergo metadata scrubbing (removal of GPS coordinates, camera models, and device IDs) before database encryption to safeguard your identity.
wb_reportSuccessDesc: Your anonymous report has been securely submitted to the Integrity Board. Write down or save the case code below. It is the only way to track progress, as no notification will be sent.
wb_descriptionPlaceholder: Provide all relevant details: specific names, dates, times, locations, and facts. Do not mention your own name or contact details.
wb_locationPlaceholder: Department office, ward or street name
wb_retaliationDesc: This report involves potential retaliation risk. Enabling this increases confidentiality protocols, redacts location details from general lists, and flags witness protection guidelines.
wb_communicateAnon: Communicate with your assigned investigator anonymously
wb_investigatorsPost: Investigators will post clarification requests here if needed.
wb_messagePlaceholder: Type your response to the officer here...
wb_transparencyDesc: This dashboard shows anonymised, aggregated metrics to ensure transparency while strictly preserving citizen anonymity. No individual report descriptions, witness locations, chat logs, or uploaded evidence are exposed here.
wb_aggregatedBreakdown: Aggregated category breakdown of submitted integrity reports
wb_cryptoDesc: All compliance verification events are written into a tamper-evident cryptographic audit ledger. Citizen credentials are never stored.
wb_footerTagline: Civic Integrity Channel · End-to-End Encrypted Data Ledger
sec_suspiciousAction: Suspicious action intercepted. Security verification required to restore session integrity.
hist_recordsDesc: Download receipt logs and view application details
hist_noSubmissionsDesc: You haven't submitted any service requests or complaints yet. When you do, they will appear here.

hist_noTxnDesc: No payment attempts matched your filter criteria.

confirmationSaved: Your confirmation has been saved and will feed into municipal analytics.
pingMeDesc: Subscribe to get real-time automatic push alerts (SMS/WhatsApp/Email) when status changes or area recovery events occur.
noEscalationsOccurred: No escalations have occurred. Your complaint is being handled normally.
